title: sebastiania glandulosa var. scabra
intro: Sebastiania glandulosa var. scabra, also known as the rough Sebastiania, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, native to the Amazon rainforest. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of using Sebastiania glandulosa var. scabra include treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often made by extracting the plant's sap or leaves.
